handoff.objective: Run an internal walkthrough with operators and reviewers to verify end-to-end workflow usability before external handoff.
agenda: Artifact readiness review (model, calibration, recommendations, execution templates)
Live CLI walkthrough from recommendation generation to campaign analysis
required_artifacts: Latest model card and calibration report
Campaign analysis and failure-mode analysis reports
Determinism report and environment lock snapshot
checklist: Nominate owner + backup operator for every critical workflow stage
Capture unresolved usability issues and classify by severity
Record decision on readiness for independent lab operation
Schedule follow-up remediation sprint for unresolved blockers

phases_if_no_go.objective: Close MVP evidence gaps for data readiness and model usability.
focus: Run first production Family A ingestion + validation pass
Triage top failure clusters and close correction loop

phases_if_no_go.objective: Complete prospective validation and operator usability proof.
focus: Run model-guided vs baseline campaigns with real logs
Run internal handoff and record independent operator results

phases_if_no_go.objective: Prepare Family B/C extension once MVP gates are satisfied.
focus: Define Family B/C schema deltas and simulation requirements
Prioritize instrumentation and data needs for multi-layer behaviors
Draft staged release plan for broader internal deployment

phases_if_go.objective: Start controlled Family B/C extension with preserved Family A reliability.
focus: Scope Family B/C dataset contracts and ingestion pathways

phases_if_go.objective: Scale broader capability and harden release workflow.
focus: Expand simulation coverage and calibration evaluation
Harden operator UX and training materials
Prepare internal release checklist for multi-family rollout
